title: Throwing a stoneware butter dish with lid
notes: A wide shallow dish base and a domed lid that sits inside the rim. Base thrown as a shallow open bowl, approximately 130 mm wide and 20 mm deep — just enough for a 250 g block of butter to sit flat. Lid thrown as a low dome with a flat gallery that fits inside the base rim with 2 mm clearance. Knob on top. Glazed cone-6 food-safe. Calipers critical for lid-to-base fit.
